semantic.role: File metadata and semantic index entry for a TypeScript source file
responsibilities: Tracking file identity and content integrity via hashes
Declaring semantic role, responsibilities, and invariants for the source file
Maintaining dependency graph edges and reverse index status
Logging provenance and pipeline stages for the indexing process
invariants: schemaVersion must be a valid semver string
identity.contentHash must match the actual file content
identity.skeletonHash must match the parsed AST skeleton
identity.semanticHash must match the semantic analysis output
filePath must be relative to the project root
driftDetected must be false unless driftReason is provided

English.role: File metadata and semantic index entry for a TypeScript source file

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the index schema; ensures compatibility with the indexing pipeline
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: Relative path to the source file; used for locating and referencing the file within the project
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: SHA-256 hash of the file contents; detects any content changes
parameter_definitions.identity.skeletonHash: Hash of the parsed AST skeleton; detects structural changes without full reindexing
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: Hash of the semantic analysis output; detects changes in meaning or behavior
parameter_definitions.identity.language: Programming language of the file; determines which parser and analysis tools to use
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: Classification of the file (source, test, config, etc.); affects how the file is processed
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: Logical scope or module the file belongs to; used for dependency and boundary analysis
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: High-level functional purpose of the file; guides human and AI understanding
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: List of subsystems or features this file is responsible for; defines its domain of control
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: Explicitly lists what this file does NOT handle; prevents scope creep and misassignment
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: Mandatory constraints or safety limits that must hold true for this file; critical for stability
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: Original architectural purpose of the file; used to detect drift
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Purpose of the most recent change; helps reviewers understand context
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: List of public APIs or interfaces exposed by this file; defines the contract with other modules
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: Any detected violations of project rules or conventions; flags for review
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: Boolean indicating whether the file has drifted from its intended role; triggers investigation
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: Explanation of why drift was detected; provides context for remediation
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: List of imported modules; used for dependency analysis and impact assessment
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: List of exported symbols; defines the public API surface
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: All symbols declared within the file; used for symbol resolution and refactoring
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.importCount: Number of imports; indicates coupling level
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.exportCount: Number of exports; indicates API surface size
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: Whether this file is a barrel (re-export) file; affects dependency resolution
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: Whether this file contains only type definitions; affects runtime behavior
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: List of files this file depends on; used for dependency graph traversal
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: List of files that depend on this file; used for impact analysis
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: Whether the reverse dependency index is fully populated; affects accuracy of impact analysis
parameter_definitions.graph.symbolEdges: Fine-grained symbol-level dependency edges; enables precise refactoring impact analysis
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: Timestamp of when this index entry was created; used for cache invalidation
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: Version of the indexing tool that created this entry; ensures compatibility
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: List of pipeline stages that processed this file; indicates analysis depth

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file is a metadata index entry for a single source file within the ArchSpine system. It does not directly control runtime behavior but is critical for the integrity of the indexing pipeline. Risks include: (1) hash mismatches causing false drift detection or missed changes, (2) incomplete reverse index leading to inaccurate impact analysis, (3) stale provenance timestamps causing cache inconsistency, and (4) missing or incorrect invariants allowing unsafe code changes to go undetected. The file's stability directly affects the reliability of dependency analysis, change impact assessment, and architectural drift detection across the entire project.

Simplified Chinese.role: TypeScript 源文件的元数据和语义索引条目

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义索引模式的版本；确保与索引管道的兼容性
parameter_definitions.identity.filePath: 源文件的相对路径；用于在项目中定位和引用该文件
parameter_definitions.identity.contentHash: 文件内容的 SHA-256 哈希值；检测任何内容变更
parameter_definitions.identity.skeletonHash: 解析后的 AST 骨架哈希值；无需完全重新索引即可检测结构变化
parameter_definitions.identity.semanticHash: 语义分析输出的哈希值；检测含义或行为的变化
parameter_definitions.identity.language: 文件的编程语言；决定使用哪个解析器和分析工具
parameter_definitions.identity.fileKind: 文件的分类（源文件、测试文件、配置文件等）；影响文件的处理方式
parameter_definitions.identity.scope: 文件所属的逻辑范围或模块；用于依赖和边界分析
parameter_definitions.semantic.role: 文件的高级功能用途；指导人类和 AI 的理解
parameter_definitions.semantic.responsibilities: 此文件负责的子系统或功能列表；定义其控制领域
parameter_definitions.semantic.outOfScope: 明确列出此文件不处理的内容；防止范围蔓延和错误分配
parameter_definitions.semantic.invariants: 此文件必须保持的强制性约束或安全限制；对稳定性至关重要
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.architecturalInten: 文件的原始架构目的；用于检测漂移
parameter_definitions.semantic.changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: 最近一次变更的目的；帮助审阅者理解上下文
parameter_definitions.semantic.publicSurface: 此文件暴露的公共 API 或接口列表；定义与其他模块的契约
parameter_definitions.semantic.ruleViolations: 检测到的任何违反项目规则或约定的情况；标记以供审查
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftDetected: 布尔值，指示文件是否偏离其预期角色；触发调查
parameter_definitions.semantic.driftReason: 检测到漂移的原因说明；为补救提供上下文
parameter_definitions.skeleton.imports: 导入的模块列表；用于依赖分析和影响评估
parameter_definitions.skeleton.exports: 导出的符号列表；定义公共 API 表面
parameter_definitions.skeleton.declaredSymbols: 文件中声明的所有符号；用于符号解析和重构
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.importCount: 导入数量；指示耦合程度
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.exportCount: 导出数量；指示 API 表面大小
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isBarrel: 此文件是否为桶文件（重新导出文件）；影响依赖解析
parameter_definitions.skeleton.structuralHints.isTypeOnly: 此文件是否仅包含类型定义；影响运行时行为
parameter_definitions.graph.dependsOn: 此文件依赖的文件列表；用于依赖图遍历
parameter_definitions.graph.dependedBy: 依赖此文件的文件列表；用于影响分析
parameter_definitions.graph.reverseIndexComplete: 反向依赖索引是否完全填充；影响影响分析的准确性
parameter_definitions.graph.symbolEdges: 细粒度的符号级依赖边；实现精确的重构影响分析
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: 此索引条目创建的时间戳；用于缓存失效
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: 创建此条目的索引工具版本；确保兼容性
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: 处理此文件的管道阶段列表；指示分析深度

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件是 ArchSpine 系统中单个源文件的元数据索引条目。它不直接控制运行时行为，但对索引管道的完整性至关重要。风险包括：(1) 哈希不匹配导致错误的漂移检测或遗漏变更，(2) 不完整的反向索引导致不准确的影响分析，(3) 过时的来源时间戳导致缓存不一致，(4) 缺失或不正确的不变量允许不安全的代码变更未被检测到。该文件的稳定性直接影响整个项目的依赖分析、变更影响评估和架构漂移检测的可靠性。
